subcodes.first_line: My God, my Adored One, my Beloved, my Heart's Desire! With what countenance shall I turn toward Thy most glorious Kingdom, and with what tongue shall I make my supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الها معبودا محبوبا مقصودا بکدام رو بملکوت ابهایت توجه نمایم و بکدام لسان طلب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @existence and nonexistence; preexistence, @prayer for parents
